fields.value:
**```ğŸ BONUS COMMANDS```**
[Show anime/manga info](https://s11.gifyu.com/images/tuto-anime-manga.png)
`$anime/manga Title`
[Show user profile](https://s11.gifyu.com/images/tuto-profil.png)
`$profil @user/user#0000/userid`
[Search a wallpaper](https://s11.gifyu.com/images/tuto-wallpaper.png)
`$wallpaper Title`
[Get an image by type](https://gifyu.com/)
`/pics_v(1/2)`
[Generate a password](https://gifyu.com/)
`/passgen`
[Translate a text](https://gifyu.com/)
`/translate`
[Convert a value from another format](https://gifyu.com/)
`/conv`
[(En/De)crypt a text](https://gifyu.com/)
`/crypt`
[Generate a QrCode](https://gifyu.com/)
`/qrgen`
